text: The sterile yet modern environment fills me with a sense of anticipation. Glass walls and orderly chairs reflect a place devoted to structured thought, possibly collaboration. Nearby, an exhibit boldly proclaims R+D, celebrating innovation. The bright colors and statements about human-machine coexistence evoke excitement, stirring in me questions about the future of our collective endeavors. I feel both energized and curious here, standing at the intersection of tradition and transformation.
